Title: Blazor Community Standup: Blazor virtualization gets flexible
Description:
Join us to explore upcoming virtualization improvements in .NET 11 for Blazor, including support for variable‑height items in the Virtualize component and new APIs for controlling scroll position.

🔗 Links: https://www.theurlist.com/blazor-standup-20260414

🎙️ Featuring: Daniel Roth, Ilona Tomkowicz

#dotnet #aspnetcore #blazor
